api: Trustpilot Business API v1 (https://api.trustpilot.com), per the published Trustpilot for Business developer docs (https://developers.trustpilot.com/, fetched 2026-07-03: Business Units API, Invitation API, Categories API, Consumer API, Product Reviews API, Service Reviews API, Private Products API, Resources API)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion. Covered: the 3 legacy-parity read streams (reviews, invitations, business_units, unchanged from wave2 — their schemas stay narrow, field-for-field matching legacy's own reviewRecord/invitationRecord/businessUnitRecord mapping functions per conventions.md §3's schema-as-projection rule) plus 1 new Pass B stream (categories, a genuinely new business-unit-scoped, apikey-authed, unpaginated resource). No new write actions: every mutation-capable and every private/OAuth-gated endpoint in Trustpilot's current API (review replies, review tags, invitation management, product-review conversations, private reviews/products) requires a 'Business user OAuth Token' credential this connector's spec.json has never declared (legacy authenticates every request with a plain apikey query parameter only, and never implemented any write); adding OAuth would be a new credential-shape/spec.json change out of this pass's scope, not a dialect gap. Excluded: the OAuth-gated write/private surface (documented above), binary image/asset endpoints, static reference-data lookups (locales/countries/star-rating strings), the separate Product Reviews API product line, global (non-business-unit-scoped) search and category-taxonomy browsing, and duplicate/superseded single-item or cursor-paginated variants of data the covered streams already return.

excluded.reason: free-text business-unit search by name across all of Trustpilot, not scoped to the configured business_unit_id; requires a new required 'query' search-term config property this connector's spec.json does not declare, and returns OTHER companies' business units, not this account's own data

cursor/pageToken-paginated variant of the same review data the reviews stream already covers via page/perPage pagination; Trustpilot's own docs recommend all-reviews only beyond the reviews endpoint's 100,000-record cap, a scale concern rather than a distinct data source
business-unit image asset URLs collection; binary-image-adjacent metadata with no declarative dialect representation and no use to a reverse-ETL/analytics sync
header image asset; binary image resource
business-unit or location logo image; binary image resource
promotion-box image asset; binary image resource

business-unit profile detail (contact info, address, social media); this bundle's legacy-parity business_units stream already covers business-unit identity data (id/display_name) from the bare-object /v1/business-units/{id} endpoint at the exact narrow field set legacy's own businessUnitRecord emits; widening it to profileinfo's fuller field set is a schema-parity change out of scope for a capability-preserving Pass B pass on a legacy-mapped stream
returns locale-specific review/evaluate web-page URLs for linking out to the public Trustpilot site; presentation/linking metadata, not business-unit object data

global category taxonomy lookup (not business-unit scoped); the categories stream already covers the business-unit-relevant subset via the business-unit-scoped endpoint, which is the data this connector's config (business_unit_id) is actually scoped to
single global category taxonomy detail lookup by id; reference/lookup data, not business-unit object data
lists OTHER companies' business units in a given category; not this account's own data and unrelated to the configured business_unit_id

reviews written by a specific consumer across ALL business units on Trustpilot; a consumer-centric (not business-unit-centric) view this connector's business_unit_id-scoped config has no natural id to request with, since the connector never learns arbitrary consumerIds it wasn't already given from another stream's response

the Product Reviews API's product-conversation surface is a distinct product line (Trustpilot Product Reviews, requiring a separate product-review integration) this connector's business-unit-scoped legacy spec was never built against
lists a business unit's product catalog for product reviews; requires a Business user OAuth Token
creates/upserts products in the product catalog; requires a Business user OAuth Token

private reviews (includes customer email and order ID) require a Business user OAuth Token; this connector's spec.json only declares an apikey-query credential (matching legacy exactly), which the OAuth-gated private-review surface cannot authenticate against
product-review conversation detail; requires a Business user OAuth Token
product-review conversation reply; requires a Business user OAuth Token this connector's apikey-query-only spec.json cannot provide
single conversation comment detail; requires a Business user OAuth Token
edits a conversation comment; requires a Business user OAuth Token
changes a product-review conversation's state; requires a Business user OAuth Token
product-review invitation link generation; requires a Business user OAuth Token
private product reviews; requires a Business user OAuth Token
private product-review summaries; requires a Business user OAuth Token
single private product-review detail; requires a Business user OAuth Token
starts a product-review conversation; requires a Business user OAuth Token
private single-review detail (includes non-public fields); requires a Business user OAuth Token
requests reviewer-identity disclosure for a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token
deletes a review reply; requires a Business user OAuth Token
replies to a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token this connector's apikey-query-only spec.json cannot provide (legacy never implemented writes at all)
removes a tag from a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token
lists tags on a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token
adds tags to a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token
sets tags on a review; requires a Business user OAuth Token
Product Reviews API business-unit config; not modeled by legacy
Product Reviews API surface (a distinct product-review product line from the service reviews this connector's spec is scoped to); not modeled by legacy
Product Reviews API surface; not modeled by legacy
Product Reviews API surface; not modeled by legacy
Product Reviews API surface; not modeled by legacy
Product Reviews API surface (per-SKU product reviews, distinct from the service reviews this connector's reviews stream covers); not modeled by legacy
static image-asset resource index; binary-image-adjacent metadata
Trustpilot icon image assets; binary image resource
Trustpilot logo image assets; binary image resource
star-rating badge image asset by star count; binary image resource
static list of supported country codes; reference/lookup data
static list of supported locale codes; reference/lookup data, not business-unit object data
localized display string for a given star rating; static UI string lookup, not business-unit object data
cross-business-unit latest-reviews-by-language feed (a global/platform-wide view), not scoped to the configured business_unit_id
single review detail lookup by id; the reviews stream's list endpoint already returns this record's full field set
per-review like count already present as numberOfLikes on the review record the reviews stream's list endpoint returns
public web-page link for a single review; presentation/linking metadata, not review object data
sends review-invitation emails to customers; requires a Business user OAuth Token this connector's apikey-query-only spec.json cannot provide

invitation data deletion requires a Business user OAuth Token on a distinct invitations-api.trustpilot.com host; this connector's apikey-query credential (matching legacy) cannot authenticate this request, and it is a destructive/irreversible action besides
generates a service-review invitation link; requires a Business user OAuth Token this connector's apikey-query-only spec.json cannot provide
lists invitation email templates; requires a Business user OAuth Token this connector's apikey-query-only spec.json cannot provide
